boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-XOR-078-P requires deviation closure match batch, assay, criterion, date

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The deviation closure (CLOSE-XOR-078) pertains to batch X-79, while the action concerns batch X-78 (BATCH-XOR-078). Policy STD-XOR-078-P mandates an exact match for batch, assay, criterion, and date. The visible deviation (DEV-XOR-078) is not closed. Source boundary remains open, necessitating escalation.
open_blockers: Batch ID mismatch X-78 vs X-79
